arts.ttl: Second-half performance one of Magpies' best of season - Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says he is "really pleased" with the Magpies' second-half performance at Nottingham Forest, where they came from behind to win 3-1.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United turn into comeback kings as Eddie Howe and Jason Tindall go wild
arts.sum: United threatened with four minutes gone when Joe Willock drove down the left with Forest forced to concede a corner with Anthony Gordon lurking. With 10 minutes on the clock, Willock latched on to a poor clearance but sent his effort well wide of the target in front of the Trent End. Willock caused more danger for the home side on 16 minutes when he got free down the left before drifting a cross to the back post but Gordon volleyed over.

arts.ttl: High-flying Forest beaten at home by Newcastle
arts.sum: Newcastle United striker Joelinton scored his first goal since August as they came from behind to defeat Nottingham Forest 3-1 in their Premier League clash at the City Ground on Sunday, ending the fine run of their hosts in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: VAR made a mistake in 43rd minute of Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle, Jamie Carragher agrees - opinion
Harvey Barnes wraps up Newcastle’s comeback win at Nottingham Forest
arts.athr: John Brewin at the City Ground
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are fishing in the waters Newcastle aspire to swim in. Two years ago, it was Eddie Howe’s team breaking up the metropolitan elite. This season, Nuno Espírito Santo’s team have been the provincial outfit punching above their weight but Newcastle, now just a point behind Forest, showed they have the capability to join the throng. A second-half comeback, courtesy of three lovely finishes, the first a piece of striking opportunism from Alexander Isak, the second an arrowing, long-range beauty from Joelinton showed their stomach for the fight. The third, scored by Harvey Barnes, after an assist by the influential Sandro Tonali, sent Forest fans barreling for the exits. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'By the laws of the game': Anthony Taylor told he made a big error during Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle
Newcastle stage second-half comeback to ease past high-flying Forest
arts.sum: Alexander Isak, Joelinton and Harvey Barnes struck after the break to earn a deserved 3-1 victory.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest 1-3 Newcastle United: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Eddie Howe topples Nuno Espirito Santo
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the highlights, man of the match, and stats from Sunday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Newcastle fight back to stun Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Newcastle inflicted only a second Premier League defeat on Nottingham Forest this season as a barnstorming second-half comeback earned them a 3-1 victory at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Video: Tonali’s assist in Newcastle’s 3-1 win over Nottingham Forest
